generation._note: CogVideoX-Fun/VOID pass1 renderer (ADR-0007). Render params fixed in VoidRendererConfig to reproduce pass1. gpu_memory_mode=model_cpu_offload_and_qfloat8 is an E2W compatibility no-op: effective bf16 model_cpu_offload for VOID numerical parity, no float8 VRAM-saving claim. Stage 2 training MUST switch to model_full_load (spec §2 Stage 2 + §5.10).
